prompt: Create a richly detailed anime fantasy illustration of two bubble-themed travelers planning a trip together inside a warm traditional Japanese tatami room. The scene shows Shikotsu-Toya National Park travel planning, with a wooden low table covered in maps, guidebooks, photos, a tablet, a notebook, a pen, tea, and sweets. On the left sits a translucent soap-slime girl with pearlescent clear skin, iridescent highlights, pale blue-white hair gathered into bubbly buns, and a neat blouse with a ribbon tie; she leans over the map thoughtfully, one hand at her chin and the other pointing to the route. On the right sits a cute soap-bubble tanuki girl with fluffy brown hair, round tanuki ears, a huge striped raccoon-dog tail, layered traditional travel clothes, beads, charms, and botanical accessories; she holds up a small card or photo while gesturing with her other hand as if explaining the itinerary. Their faces and the raised card are deliberately covered by four flat opaque censor rectangles: one pale gray rectangle over the slime girl’s face, one medium tan rectangle over the tanuki girl’s main face area, one darker tan rectangle over the raised card/hand area near the center, and one dark brown rectangle over the tanuki ear/upper-right face area. Include exactly 24 visible soap bubbles: 8 larger scenic bubbles containing tiny miniature landscapes of lakes, mountains, forests, and travel spots; 7 smaller floating bubbles around the characters; and 9 clustered bubbles integrated into the slime girl’s hair. The room has sliding shoji doors, warm wooden beams, a scroll painting on the wall, a small flower arrangement, a glowing floor lamp, and a large open window revealing a sparkling river, rocks, and lush green forest outside. The table details should include exactly 7 main planning items: an unfolded map, an open photo guidebook, a tablet showing a landscape image, a spiral notebook with sketchy notes, a fountain pen, a cup of green tea, and a bowl of small sweets. Use luminous high-detail anime rendering, soft golden afternoon light, gentle depth of field, iridescent rainbow reflections on all bubble surfaces, cozy travel-planning mood, painterly background, intricate fabrics and accessories, no text, no watermark. Overall atmosphere: whimsical, serene, magical, and inviting, as if the two characters are building a dream itinerary for a national park hot springs and lake journey.
